name: ContentUndoHelper
summary: Content undo helper to be used with "using {}" to enclose a block of changes.

constructors.name: ContentUndoHelper
constructors.summary: Constructs a ContentUndoHelper object inside a using block to handle undo when modifying a RenderContent or - alternatively - create the ContentUndoHelper and explicitly call Dispose when you are done.

params.name: description
params.doc: Undo description (which appears in the UI when undo is run)

methods.name: AddContent
methods.signature: public bool AddContent(RenderContent content, RenderContent parent)
methods.summary: Call this *after* adding a content. Undo will cause the content to be deleted.

params.name: content
params.doc: Content you just added to the ContentList.

params.name: parent
params.doc: is the content that will become the parent of the new content, or null if the new content is being added at the top level (i.e., not a child).

returns.doc: true if the content was added.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the ContentUndoHelper

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the ContentUndoHelper and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: isDisposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: ModifyContent
methods.summary: Call this before modifying or deleting a content. Undo will cause the content to be restored.

params.name: content
params.doc: Content you are about to modify.

returns.doc: true if the content was modified.

methods.name: TweakContent
methods.signature: public bool TweakContent(RenderContent content, string parameterName)
methods.summary: Call this before tweaking a single content parameter. Undo will cause the parameter to be restored.

params.name: parameterName
params.doc: The parameter name you are about to change.

returns.doc: true if the content was tweaked.
